class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/PinocchioKinematicsBackend
class.description: Placeholder Pinocchio backend with the same interface as KDL.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/EndEffectorPositionTask
class.description: Track the Cartesian position of an end-effector.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/EndEffectorOrientationTask
class.description: Track the orientation of an end-effector.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/EndEffectorPoseTask
class.description: Track full pose of an end-effector.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/FramePoseTask
class.description: Track full pose of an arbitrary frame, including the base frame.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/JointNominalTask
class.description: Bias the solution toward a nominal joint configuration.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/BaseYawTask
class.description: Track a desired base yaw angle.

class.name: task_priority_kinematic_control/SelfCollisionAvoidanceTask
class.description: Repel simplified collision geometry away from self-collision.
